heading: Designation of Gateway Arch National Park
label: 450jj–10 Designation of Gateway Arch National Park

children.heading: Redesignation
children.label: a Redesignation
children.text: The Jefferson National Expansion Memorial established under sections 450jj to 450jj–9 of this title shall be known and designated as the “Gateway Arch National Park”.

children.heading: References
children.label: b References
children.text: Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Jefferson National Expansion Memorial shall be considered to be a reference to the “Gateway Arch National Park”.
